verdicts.corrected_value: Coda is an all-in-one collaborative workspace that brings teams, tools, and workflows together in one doc so teams can make docs, build workflows, and move work forward.
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage confirms the description of Coda as a collaborative workspace that integrates teams and tools.
The official documentation explicitly states that Personal API tokens and OAuth 2.0 are used for authentication.
The documentation confirms that the Coda API is available free of charge to all users, including those with free workspaces.
The API documentation confirms that it is a RESTful API covering various resources such as docs, pages, and tables.
The ability to create personal API tokens and the availability of public REST documentation confirm that the API is buildable today.
